sentences.en: Put your shoes on, we need to hurry.
sentences.zh: 穿上鞋子，我們得快一點了。
sentences.ipa: /pʊt jʊər ʃuːz ɑːn wiː niːd tuː ˈhɜːri/

sentences.en: Can you use your fork instead of your fingers?
sentences.zh: 可以用叉子而不是用手指嗎？
sentences.ipa: /kæn juː juːz jʊər fɔːrk ɪnˈsted ʌv jʊər ˈfɪŋɡərz/

sentences.en: Rinse the soap out of your eyes carefully.
sentences.zh: 小心把眼睛裡的肥皂沖乾淨。
sentences.ipa: /rɪns ðə soʊp aʊt ʌv jʊər aɪz ˈkerfəli/

sentences.en: Stay close to me in the crowd.
sentences.zh: 在人群裡要靠近我。
sentences.ipa: /steɪ kloʊs tuː miː ɪn ðə kraʊd/

sentences.en: Hold onto the bars tightly.
sentences.zh: 緊緊抓住單槓。
sentences.ipa: /hoʊld ˈɑːntuː ðə bɑːrz ˈtaɪtli/

sentences.en: Let's put your homework in your folder.
sentences.zh: 把功課放進資料夾裡吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets pʊt jʊər ˈhoʊmwɜːrk ɪn jʊər ˈfoʊldər/

sentences.en: Read the question again, slowly this time.
sentences.zh: 再讀一次題目，這次慢慢讀。
sentences.ipa: /riːd ðə ˈkwestʃən əˈɡen ˈsloʊli ðɪs taɪm/

sentences.en: You can trade toys if you both agree.
sentences.zh: 如果你們都同意，可以交換玩具。
sentences.ipa: /juː kæn treɪd tɔɪz ɪf juː boʊθ əˈɡriː/

sentences.en: Let's count to ten together to feel better.
sentences.zh: 我們一起數到十，會感覺好一點。
sentences.ipa: /lets kaʊnt tuː ten təˈɡeðər tuː fiːl ˈbetər/

sentences.en: We agreed on no snacks before dinner.
sentences.zh: 我們說好晚餐前不吃零食。
sentences.ipa: /wiː əˈɡriːd ɑːn noʊ snæks bɪˈfɔːr ˈdɪnər/

sentences.en: What a creative idea, I love it!
sentences.zh: 好有創意的點子，我好喜歡！
sentences.ipa: /wʌt ə kriˈeɪtɪv aɪˈdiə aɪ lʌv ɪt/

sentences.en: Keep sharp objects away from your little sister.
sentences.zh: 尖銳的東西要遠離妹妹。
sentences.ipa: /kiːp ʃɑːrp ˈɑːbdʒekts əˈweɪ frʌm jʊər ˈlɪtl ˈsɪstər/

sentences.en: Let's put on a cool compress for that bump.
sentences.zh: 我們幫這個腫包敷冰袋吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets pʊt ɑːn ə kuːl ˈkɑːmpres fɔːr ðæt bʌmp/

sentences.en: Your cousin brought her new puppy today.
sentences.zh: 表姊今天帶了她的新小狗來。
sentences.ipa: /jʊər ˈkʌzən brɔːt hɜːr nuː ˈpʌpi təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: Let's write a card for your friend's birthday.
sentences.zh: 我們幫朋友的生日寫張卡片吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets raɪt ə kɑːrd fɔːr jʊər frendz ˈbɜːrθdeɪ/

sentences.en: Chew with your mouth closed, please.
sentences.zh: 請閉著嘴巴咀嚼。
sentences.ipa: /tʃuː wɪð jʊər maʊθ kloʊzd pliːz/

sentences.en: It's foggy this morning, stay close to me.
sentences.zh: 今天早上有霧，要靠近我。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts ˈfɔːɡi ðɪs ˈmɔːrnɪŋ steɪ kloʊs tuː miː/

sentences.en: That's enough YouTube for now.
sentences.zh: 現在YouTube看得夠久了。
sentences.ipa: /ðæts ɪˈnʌf ˈjuːtjuːb fɔːr naʊ/

sentences.en: Let's wrap this gift for your cousin.
sentences.zh: 我們幫表哥包這個禮物吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets ræp ðɪs ɡɪft fɔːr jʊər ˈkʌzən/

sentences.en: Can you guess what happens on the next page?
sentences.zh: 你能猜猜下一頁會發生什麼事嗎？
sentences.ipa: /kæn juː ɡes wʌt ˈhæpənz ɑːn ðə nekst peɪdʒ/
